params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-1 multiplexer with an enable control. It selects one of the four 4-bit input lines (in0, in1, in2, in3) based on a 2-bit selection input (sel). When the enable signal (en) is deasserted, the output reflects the selected input; otherwise, the output is set to zero regardless of the selection.
